Home.title: Welcome to
Home.subtitle: Raíces & Returnings
Home.paragraph-description: A space for the stories we carry, the ones we're still learning how to tell, and the ones we're finally ready to live.
Home.paragraph-description-two: Here, you'll find reflections on identity, queerness, healing, spirituality, and home. You'll find recipes passed down and reimagined. You'll find reminders—written and wearable—that speak to the parts of you still becoming.
Home.paragraph-fresh: New reflections. New recipes. Same corazón. Catch the latest           stories, kitchen moments, and real talk—straight from us to you. Scroll through, click around, stay a while.
